nodejs: nodejs A versatile JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 engine, enabling server-side development with event-driven, non-blocking I/O. Perfect for building scalable network applications and real-time systems.
typescript: typescript A typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to clean JavaScript code. Provides static type checking and advanced IDE support for writing more maintainable and error-resistant applications.
c#: c# A modern, object-oriented programming language from Microsoft, part of the .NET ecosystem. Known for its clean syntax, strong typing, and extensive framework for building Windows, web, and game applications.
python: python A high-level, interpreted language emphasizing code readability and simplicity. Widely used in data science, machine learning, automation, and web development with a rich ecosystem of libraries.
go: go A compiled, statically-typed language designed for simplicity and efficiency. Excellent for building concurrent, networked applications with fast compilation and minimal resource overhead.
.net: .net A cross-platform, open-source framework for building modern applications. Provides comprehensive tools and libraries for web, desktop, mobile, and cloud development with strong performance characteristics.
react: react A JavaScript library for building user interfaces with reusable components. Uses a virtual DOM for efficient rendering and a declarative approach to managing application state and UI updates.
react-admin: react-admin A React framework for building admin interfaces and data-intensive applications. Provides pre-built components and utilities for rapid development of administrative dashboards and CRUD operations.
nextjs: nextjs A React framework that enables production-grade applications with server-side rendering, static generation, and API routes. Optimized for performance, SEO, and developer experience out of the box.
gatsby: gatsby A React-based static site generator for building blazing fast websites and applications. Leverages GraphQL for data querying and provides excellent optimization and deployment features.
astro: astro A modern static site builder that ships zero JavaScript by default. Supports multiple frameworks, partial hydration, and dynamic island architecture for optimal performance and user experience.
vue: vue A progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces. Known for its gentle learning curve, flexible architecture, and excellent documentation for both simple and complex applications.
nuxtjs: nuxtjs A powerful Vue.js framework for building universal applications. Provides server-side rendering, static generation, modules, and a simplified development experience with sensible defaults.
angular: angular A comprehensive TypeScript-based framework for building large-scale, complex web applications. Provides opinionated structure, dependency injection, RxJS integration, and extensive tooling.
svelte: svelte A compiler that generates highly optimized vanilla JavaScript code from component definitions. Offers reactive programming at language-level with minimal runtime overhead and smaller bundle sizes.
express: express A minimal and flexible Node.js web application framework. Provides simple routing, middleware support, and extensibility for building RESTful APIs and web servers with ease.
django: django A high-level Python web framework for rapid development and clean design. Includes built-in admin interface, ORM, authentication, and many features for building secure, scalable applications.
chi: chi A lightweight, idiomatic HTTP router for Go. Designed for composability and middleware support, making it ideal for building RESTful APIs and web services with clean, maintainable code.
nestjs: nestjs A progressive Node.js framework for building scalable server-side applications. Uses TypeScript, dependency injection, and modular architecture for enterprise-grade applications with excellent testability.
github-actions: github-actions GitHub's native CI/CD platform for automating workflows directly from your repository. Provides event-driven automation for testing, building, and deploying code with wide ecosystem integration.
gitlab-ci: gitlab-ci GitLab's integrated CI/CD solution for continuous integration and deployment. Offers powerful pipeline definitions, environments, and comprehensive monitoring for software delivery.
jenkins: jenkins An open-source automation server for continuous integration and delivery. Highly extensible with plugins, supports distributed builds, and provides flexibility for complex CI/CD pipelines.
terraform: terraform An infrastructure-as-code tool for provisioning and managing cloud resources. Supports multiple providers, maintains state, and enables declarative infrastructure management across platforms.
teamcity: teamcity A sophisticated CI/CD server by JetBrains with powerful build configurations. Offers excellent IDE integration, branch detection, and comprehensive reporting for software development teams.
aws: aws Amazon Web Services, a leading cloud computing platform providing compute, storage, networking, and database services. Offers extensive services for building scalable, reliable applications globally.
lambda: lambda AWS serverless compute service for running code without provisioning servers. Pay only for execution time, scales automatically, and integrates seamlessly with other AWS services.
ec2: ec2 Amazon's scalable virtual computing environment providing resizable compute capacity. Offers flexibility in instance types, operating systems, and configurations for diverse workload requirements.
s3: s3 Amazon Simple Storage Service for object storage at scale. Provides durability, availability, security, and performance for storing and retrieving any amount of data from anywhere.
azure: azure Microsoft's comprehensive cloud computing platform offering services for compute, storage, networking, and analytics. Integrated with Microsoft products and strong enterprise support.
functions: functions Azure's serverless computing service for running event-driven code. Supports multiple languages, scales automatically, and integrates with Azure ecosystem and third-party services.
azure-data-explorer: azure-data-explorer A fast, scalable data exploration and analytics service. Optimized for analyzing large volumes of data with powerful query language and real-time analytics capabilities.
gcp: gcp Google Cloud Platform providing scalable computing, storage, and application services. Known for data analytics, machine learning, and excellent performance for big data workloads.
kubernetes: kubernetes An open-source container orchestration platform for automating deployment, scaling, and management. Provides powerful features for managing containerized applications in production environments.
bigquery: bigquery Google's serverless, highly scalable data warehouse for big data analytics. Handles petabyte-scale datasets with powerful SQL querying and machine learning integration.
cloudflare: cloudflare A global content delivery network and cybersecurity company. Provides DDoS protection, caching, WAF, and performance optimization for websites and applications worldwide.
workers: workers Cloudflare's serverless computing platform for running code on the edge. Enables fast, distributed applications with low latency and global reach without managing infrastructure.
workflows: workflows Cloudflare Workflows for orchestrating complex, multi-step serverless workflows. Enables building reliable, durable automation and integration logic at the edge.
kv: kv Cloudflare's distributed key-value store for low-latency data access globally. Perfect for caching, session management, and storing application state with strong consistency.
pages: pages Cloudflare Pages for deploying static sites and JAMstack applications. Provides Git integration, automatic builds, and global distribution with zero configuration deployment.
d1: d1 Cloudflare's serverless SQL database built on SQLite. Brings relational data closer to applications with simple APIs and regional replication for low latency.
vectorize: vectorize Cloudflare's vector database service for storing and querying vector embeddings. Enables building AI-powered applications with semantic search and similarity matching capabilities.
